description: A manufacturing engineer needs to create a flat gasket cutting template for an engine exhaust port flange. The gasket profile must be drawn in SolveSpace according to the specification sheet on the Desktop, which defines the outer boundary, exhaust port bore shape, bolt hole pattern, material thickness, and output file requirements. The sketch must be fully constrained (0 degrees of freedom), then extruded to the specified material thickness. Save the model as /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/exhaust_gasket.slvs and export the sketch to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/exhaust_gasket.dxf.
